\# Copilot Instructions



\## Repository Discovery



This repository contains a repository-governance and execution framework named KERNEL.



Before making implementation recommendations, assessing repository status, estimating completion, proposing architecture changes, or selecting development priorities:



Read:



AGENTS.md



Then read:



.agent/kernel/DISCOVERY.md



Follow the discovery workflow.



Do not assume repository state.



Do not assume implementation phase.



Do not assume completion status.



Repository conclusions must be evidence-based and reproducible.



\## Required Outcome



Produce:



CURRENT STATE



including:



\- Project Structure

\- Verified Existing

\- Incomplete Components

\- Missing Components

\- Current Implementation Phase

\- Highest Priority Gap

\- Recommended Next Step

\- Known Risks

\- Technical Debt

\- Git Hygiene Status



If evidence is insufficient:



Report:



INSUFFICIENT\_EVIDENCE



and stop.
